title: Free Consultation
description: Get a free initial consultation to discuss your study abroad goals, eligibility, and the best university options for you.

title: University Grants
description: We help you secure grants and scholarships from TOP universities worldwide, covering application strategy and documentation.

title: Document Preparation
description: We handle document submission to up to 3 universities, including recommendation letters, essays, and all required paperwork.

title: Visa Services
description: Complete visa application support - from document gathering to interview preparation and submission.

title: Pre-Departure Training
description: Free training sessions from specialists who have lived abroad, covering culture, academics, and practical life tips.

title: Language Courses
description: IELTS preparation courses and language training to meet university admission requirements, with work opportunity guidance.
